name: HackSlash
short_description: Action RPG electronic game, with soulslike elements, the environment is an arena with infinite waves of enemies with a medieval fantasy theme. Your goal is to get the highest score possible, killing as many enemies as possible and passing as many waves as possible.
detailed_description:
You are a knight of the Order, but you have been sent to a Deadly Arena by an unknown magic, do your best and try to escape.
You will face endless waves of enemies, including goblins, skeletons and ghosts.
In addition to the enemies, the Mortal Arena contains mysteries and challenges to be overcome, you must be careful in some environments.
To help you, you can choose a skill to use in difficult moments and every 2 waves you can improve your statistics.

Commands;
Attack - Left Click
Defend - Right Click
Lock and Unlock Camera - Mouse Scroll
Move - W,A,S,D
Camera - Mouse
Run - Left Shift
Heal - Q
Roll - Space
Use Skills - E
Menu - Enter
